name: ramp-warmup-cooldown
description: A Zwift-style Warmup ramping 50->75 %FTP and a Cooldown ramping 75->50 %FTP MUST NOT normalize to the same record. `ramp`'s `from`/`to` are directional and order-significant (§5.10) — unlike `range`'s unordered `min`/`max`, which cannot distinguish a ramp from its reverse. This is the regression test for the bug OB-34 reports: before `ramp` existed, a warmup and its reverse-order cooldown both canonicalized to the identical `range` object.
